Author: Crystal Job Rank contributors
Name: Crystal Job Rank
Punchline: Per-character, per-job CC ratings and an automatic community ladder.
Description: Tracks Casual and Ranked CC ratings per character and job, local records, role badges, and an automatic cross-region community leaderboard. Use /cjr.
Changelog: Starts rating rules v4 and a fresh season. Community participation is automatic with no registration or character lock; ratings are keyed by character, Home World, job, and season. Casual group matches count normally. Adds the transparent Beta(20,20) W/L formula, provisional entries from match one, deterministic duplicate protection, canonical World names, and safer background persistence; local history, non-rating records, and badges are preserved.
